slides.headline: Tom's website was dead.
slides.body: Well — a sad one from 2014. Customers couldn't find him, and the few who did couldn't do anything. Swipe.

slides.headline: A website should win you the job.
slides.body: His was a brochure nobody read. No way to ask, no way to book.

slides.headline: We built him a new one — chat and voice enabled.
slides.body: Visitors can ask a question and get a real answer — by typing or talking.

slides.headline: And they can book. 24/7.
slides.body: No form that goes to an inbox he checks on Sundays. Booked, there and then.

slides.label: his website now works while he sleeps — his best salesperson

slides.headline: Website doing nothing for you?
slides.save: Save this if your site is just sitting there
